description_long: This is a classic wooden barrel with a cylindrical shape, constructed from vertical wooden staves bound together by three wide, dark metal hoops. The wood is medium brown with visible grain and subtle carved lines, giving it a rustic, hand-crafted appearance. The metal bands are matte black and studded with large, rounded rivets for reinforcement. On one side, a small wooden spigot is present, suggesting the barrel is designed to dispense liquids. The top and bottom are flat, with the top surface showing a circular pattern of wood grain. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for storage or transport of liquids or dry goods in an urban or industrial setting.
description: A sturdy wooden barrel with dark metal hoops and a small spigot, featuring a rustic, reinforced design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wooden spigot protruding from the lower center and all three metal hoops with rivets.
description_view_1: Side view with the spigot visible on the left edge and the curvature of the barrel emphasized.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with no spigot visible, highlighting the uninterrupted wood and metal banding.
description_view_3: Rear view with only the metal hoops and wood visible, no spigot or additional features apparent.
